entry.title: Being in love
entry.summary:
Author: FrancesJanviergirl

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,082Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “We are eating and if you want to be entertained just talk to us.” Eddie tried again.“But I am looking at you already.” Chris said.“You are looking at your phone son.”“Yeah.” At that Chris turned his screen towards them and surprisingly enough they were confronted with their own faces. Their faces, but there was music playing in the background of those videos and there was flash effects that turned either moments from interviews or moments from the competition into a supercut.“What is that?” Buck squinted at a compilation of him simply looking at Eddie in different moments. The title of the video said get someone who looks at you the way Buck looks at Eddie.“Those are edits.” Chris clarified as if there is no more explanation needed, before scrolling down and showing them the next one.   Or when Buck signs Eddie up to a fire fighter competition they dont expect the amount of press and fans that goes along with it so when they are being interviewed by Taylor Kelly in her girlfriends pilates studio, she becomes the second ex of Buck who says she thought he might be in love with his best friend.

entry.title: You can have my back
entry.summary:
Author: Whatdawnknows

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,396Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 158

Summary: Eddie quirks an eyebrow when he sees who’s calling him.“Buck? I thought you were at your knitting thing.”“Stitch n Bitch, Eddie. You know what it’s called.”“Right. That.” Eddie is not saying that out loud. “I thought you were busy tonight, what’s up?”“Um, yeah, I’m at Stitch n Bitch but, um. I need you.” OR: Buck throws his back out at Stitch n Bitch. He calls Eddie for help.

entry.title: Surprise Party (For All)
entry.summary:
Author: FeatherForARose

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,298Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 99

Summary: For Eddie's birthday, Buck goes all out. Cake, banner, surprise party, there's even confetti in little cups to throw when he gets there.Yes, maybe Buck is thinking about Christopher's party that Eddie's parents went all out for, unlike they did for their own child. But really, he just thinks Eddie deserves it because he's Eddie.The problem is, in all the chaos of planning, decorating, and cooking, he forgot to do two things: Invite everyone and check the cake.-:-:-:-:-:-Or, Buck gets the wrong cake, but maybe it was the right cake all along.

entry.title: Dorm Room 118
entry.summary:
Author: loving-you-is-payneful (LightFairy)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,139Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 12

Summary: When Buck moves into Dorm Room 118, he’s hoping college will finally give him the fresh start he’s been craving. Instead, he finds himself drawn to his quiet, guarded roommate, Eddie. Over the course of their college years these two find out that family is not just the people that you were born into. It’s also the people you choose along the way.

entry.title: giddyup
entry.summary:
Author: playinginthunderstorms

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,195Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 136

Summary: Eddie is fluid, loose-limbed and pink-cheeked with the top three buttons of his shirt undone and his feet are matching the steps of the rest of the crowd on the dance floor with zero hesitation, and Buck is— Buck is mesmerized. Captivated. His stupid drunk eyes won't leave the line of Eddie's torso as he steps and spins and grins, and so Buck is helpless to do anything other than keep tripping over his own feet, three, four, five steps behind, distracted by the music and the shine of sweat on Eddie's cheekbones.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: It was the end of a decade, but the start of an age
entry.summary:
Author: titaniclikeship003

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,681Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: “Diving into deep waters, and diving into love can both leave you with the bends.” It was a phrase Abby had told Buck once, way back when they’d first met, way before they had gotten together. It had been a response to him asking her why it had been so long since she’d been in a relationship. She had told him, over the phone, that she wasn’t a risk taker, she thought out what she was going to do, planned every choice she made, so that if something happened, it wouldn’t leave her feeling worse than she did before. Diving could be beautiful, the water, the ocean was a wide, vast territory of the most magnificent creatures and corals, but it could leave you sick. It could kill you, and sometimes the dive into those deep waters wasn't worth the bends. He thought about that phrase before every relationship he jumped into, and when the water came up to swallow him whole, he thought that for the first time, he understood the bends.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: If Only He Knew He’d Be Alright
entry.summary:
Author: buckmeetsboy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,808Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 219

Summary: He stepped closer and put it on Buck’s head. It was a stupid prop. A cheap hat from a basket on the sidewalk. And it still did something violent to Eddie’s ability to form coherent thoughts. Buck went still while Eddie adjusted the brim—small, careful movements, because Eddie couldn’t help it. Because if he was going to do this, he was going to do it right. Buck tipped his chin up slightly. Their eyes met under the brim. Or Eddie tries to come out to Buck in Nashville but they keep getting interrupted

entry.title: Don't You Feel It, Too?
entry.summary:
Author: lovemeanyway13

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,273Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 35

Summary: “Y-yeah, I guess you’re right. I just,” Buck sighs. “I don’t want to make it weird, especially since I…” His eyes widened and cheeks flushed, his mouth pressing down in a straight line. “Nevermind. Yeah, I’ll talk to him.” His focus honed in on the knitting needles, now moving quicker than ever before. “Since you… what?” Artie raised his eyebrows and stopped knitting, staring deeply at Buck. He and everyone in the room all stopped knitting to join in the ‘let’s all stare at Buck and make him wildly uncomfortable’ game. or: the Stitch and Bitch crew gets involved and makes sure Buck and Eddie get together.

entry.title: hunger hurts but starving works (when it costs too much to love)
entry.summary:
Author: likes_koolaid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,022Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: Buck can't remember when he realized hunger could be a choice. It didn't start out as a conscious decision of, Oh, I shouldn't eat today, just a rushing to school before he had time for breakfast, forgetting to bring lunch, being at football practice too late and missing dinner. But when Maddie left, it became more deliberate, calculated. Putting the apple back in the bowl, eating half his lunch and giving away the rest, saying he got dinner on the way home. or, Buck doesn't eat sometimes

entry.title: Worth Every Penny (And more)
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,627Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 475

Summary: Eddie's hand shot up before his brain could stop him. "Two thousand." It was for the orphans. The words left his mouth like they’d had been fired from a cannon, and every head at his table swivelled toward him. "Eddie?" Chimney's eyebrows climbed so high they nearly lifted off his face. "What." Eddie kept his gaze fixed on the stage, where Buck had gone very still, that grin frozen in place and his eyes locked directly on Eddie. “May can bid for Ravi, but I can’t bid for Buck?” “I think that was different?” Chimney gaped at him. “…wasn’t it?” Or Eddie bids on Buck at the auction, things escalate from there. ------------------------Warning: This fic is shameless smut and I regret nothing.

entry.title: me more cowboy than you
entry.summary:
Author: thebloodysmut

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,838Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: “You seem mighty important to each other.” Buck swallowed, eyes catching on the rogue strand of hair flopped over Eddie’s forehead from a distance, and said, “Yeah, he is. Christopher, too. Ever since Eddie started at the 118 they’ve both been family to me.” Taylor had nodded, eyes bright. “I can see that. From Eddie too, by the way.” She said the last part gently, like she was trying not to spook a horse. “If that means something to you.” ~ Or: Buck and Eddie go out to the bar after the Nashville firefighter games.

entry.title: dressed in clichés
entry.summary:
Author: helikesyou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,377Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 36

Summary: “I was never really good at the whole dating thing, and you,” Eddie smiled wryly, gesturing between Buck and the dance floor, “clearly are.”Buck’s face did something that Eddie couldn’t decipher, then shuttered. “Right. Of course. Well,” he smiled at Eddie, but it was weak at the edges and didn’t quite reach his eyes. “That’s what the practice is for.”“I’m not sure practice is gonna fix this, Buck. I don’t even know where to start.”“I’ll teach you,” Buck said easily, and then his eyes widened as if he’d realized the implication of what he’d offered.   or, buck teaches eddie how to flirt and the nashville trip leads to some revelations

entry.title: a very buddie christmas
entry.summary:
Author: Bubblezzx88

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,209Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 39

Summary: The next shift, the first preset was there when he opened his locker. Buck saw the little bag and looked around—part of him wondered who left it there.Buck pulls the tissue from the bag, and under it is the box from his favorite bakery near the firehouse. It was an apple strudel with extra white icing on top, just the way he likes it."What?" He mumbles curiously.He hadn't expected Secret Santa gifts to start so soon. A little card with neat handwriting was under the box.Buck, For the sweetest guy I know. A treat for you! Santa :) Or; Buck gets Secret Santa gifts for 12 days leading to the annual 118 Christmas Party, Part of the 118 Holigays: Wrapped up, Red Panties, Riding all the way, and Secret Santa,

entry.summary:
Author: thelonggoodbye

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,868Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: “Buck,” Eddie says, and he waits until Buck looks up to continue, “you matter to me.” “We just met.” They did and they didn’t. “So?” Eddie bumps his shoulder again. “I liked you from the very first moment I saw you.” “Onstage and for sale?” “Nah. I saw you before that.”Or: how Buck's first experience up for auction actually went.

entry.title: Project Primus
entry.summary:
Author: TrustyRobot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,282Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 205

Summary: “Okay,” Tony murmured. “We’ve got layered encryption. Redundant partitions. Someone really didn’t want this touched.” “Can you get in?” Sam asked. Tony scoffed. “Please.” Directories began populating across the screen. WEAPONS DEVELOPMENTSERUM ITERATIONSASSET DEPLOYMENTSTRATEGIC EMBED NETWORK Natasha leaned closer. “That last one’s sleeper agents.” Steve’s jaw tightened. Of course it was.

entry.title: The Human Weighted Blanket
entry.summary:
Author: Spruce_Goose

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,397Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 1,632

Summary: Except the firehouse doesn’t have a weighted blanket.It does, however, have—“Buck?” Eddie tilts his head back against the couch cushion, looking at Buck sitting at the dining table with the cap of his pen between his teeth.“Hm?” He looks up from the crossword, glancing at Eddie.“What’s up?”“Can you come here for a second?”“Okay, sure.”Buck caps the pen and drops it on the table with a clatter. His chair scrapes against the floor of the loft with a sound that makes Eddie’s teeth ache. Each step Buck takes across the loft rattles Eddie’s bones to the point that a Jack and the Beanstalk joke sits on the tip of his tongue.***********OR Eddie turns Buck into his personal weighted blanket.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
